title: zerene vanilla
description: a simple pack with some optimizations and extra's.
body:
A light custom fabric client with quality of life fixes and performance increases. For use on the [Zerene](https://zerene.cc/ 'https://zerene.cc/') Vanilla Server. This pack preloaded with our server IP. Our server is running support for this modpack and Vanilla clients.. If you want to join you will need to be whitelisted. More info on this you can find in our [discord server](https://discord.gg/ZfEU7a2 'title').

---

For installation you can follow these [instructions](https://docs.modrinth.com/modpacks/play 'https://docs.modrinth.com/modpacks/play')

---

If there are any problems feel free to ask in our [discord server](https://discord.gg/ZfEU7a2 'title').

---
